recommendations.title: Till Luck Do Us: Part 3
recommendations.overview: After waking from a coma, Tino learns his future in-laws have given him a high-powered financial job, for which he is woefully unqualified.

recommendations.title: The Beachnickers
recommendations.overview: Things go from bad to worse when four co-workers decide to enjoy the extended holiday at a beach house with their families.

recommendations.title: A Not So Merry Christmas
recommendations.overview: A curse is placed on grinchy Chuy, who wakes up to find he's lived a full year, but is doomed to remember only Christmas Day. Every year. From now on.

recommendations.title: Head Over Heels
recommendations.overview: After being left by her husband and fired from her work, a workaholic, thirtysomething businesswoman is forced to go through a big change in her life and becomes a partner on a decadent sex shop.

recommendations.title: Loucas pra Casar
recommendations.overview: Malu, Lúcia and Maria found the ideal man to marry. Until they discover that in reality this man is the same person: Samuel, who was dating all of them over the past years. The three will have to decide if they will fight amongst each other for exclu

recommendations.title: The Honest Candidate
recommendations.overview: João Ernesto Ribamar is a corrupt politician running for the presidency. He is in the runoff election, ahead on the polls, when he receives a "mandinga" (curse) from his grandmother, which makes him unable to lie. Now the problem begins: How to win a

recommendations.title: It's a Wonderful Life
recommendations.overview: George Bailey has spent his entire life giving to the people of Bedford Falls.  All that prevents rich skinflint Mr. Potter from taking over the entire town is George's modest building and loan company.  But on Christmas Eve the business's $8,000 is

recommendations.title: Till Luck Do Us Part
recommendations.overview: Check out the hilarious story of luck and misadventures of Tino, a family man whose life is transformed after he wins the lottery. Dazzled by wealth, this boaster spends all his money on a life of luxury and ostentation. But after finding out that he

recommendations.title: FX's A Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: London, 1843. Ebenezer Scrooge, a bitter old man, despises the Christmas holiday. Over the course of Christmas Eve night he is visited by three ghosts to show him his past, present and future.

recommendations.title: Let It Snow
recommendations.overview: In a small town on Christmas Eve, a snowstorm brings together a group of young people. They soon find their friendships and love lives colliding, and come Christmas morning, nothing will be the same.
